name: Vitamin D3
summary: Decision-ready summary: Vitamin D3 is best framed for vitamin D deficiency correction; bone health; immune support when deficient; safety screen: hypercalcemia; sarcoidosis; high-dose use without labs.
description: Vitamin D3 supports bone; deficiency; immune with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: Vitamin D3 may modestly support depressive symptoms, especially short term, but does not show significant anxiety effects in this review.
claimMap.notes: Vitamin D3 may modestly support depressive symptoms, especially short term, but does not show significant anxiety effects in this review.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Per 1000 IU/day modeled; strongest short-term effect in depressive symptoms

sources.title: The effect of vitamin D supplementation on depression: a systematic review and dose-response meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
sources.citation: 31 RCTs/24,189 participants; depressive symptoms modest short-term improvement; no significant anxiety effect.
